scripts.check:lint: uv run ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.check:test: uv run python -m pytest tests/unit/ tests/integration/ tests/e2e/ -q --cov=kicad_mcp --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=80
scripts.check:ci: npm run check:lint && npm run check:type && npm run check:test
scripts.hooks:pre-commit: npm run check:lint && npm run check:type
scripts.hooks:security: npm run check:bandit && npm run check:audit
